a685b93f-02b5-4a77-9d56-3bcbfa1117ba.label: text_chunk
a685b93f-02b5-4a77-9d56-3bcbfa1117ba.text: REG NO: HDX4-51-130 This non-disclosure agreement (the “Agreement”) is entered into by and between _______________________, with company registration number ___________________, address at __________________________________  and fax number ________________  hereinafter referred to as “Haldex”, and ______________________, with company registration number ___________________ , address at __________________________________ and fax number_____________________ hereinafter referred to as the Supplier.

7ded360b-68db-4285-ad3a-099d9ab79e1a.label: text_chunk
7ded360b-68db-4285-ad3a-099d9ab79e1a.text:
Haldex and Supplier are hereinafter jointly referred to as Parties and individually as Party. 1. Purpose Haldex and the Supplier will evaluate the possibility to enter into an agreement regarding . For this purpose, the Parties need to exchange Confidential Information.

2. Confidential Information

2.1 Confidential Information shall mean:

i) all technical,

 financial and business information disclosed by one Party to the other Party or by another Haldex Group entity to the Supplier including,

063959c0-6456-4565-97de-525987a52032.label: text_chunk

d65d9580-8e5d-45ca-859e-ecc42bc49518.label: text_chunk

f621b411-6cb6-4e98-bbb8-6817cd03a764.label: text_chunk
f621b411-6cb6-4e98-bbb8-6817cd03a764.text:
HDX4-51-130 Replaces SCM-0021
LEGAL#1597040V1

iv) information developed or created by one Party independently of the other,

 without any part thereof having been developed or created with assistance or information received from the other Party; and

v) information which is disclosed due to any requirement under mandatory law.

3. Undertakings of the Parties

The Parties undertake:

i) to treat all Confidential Information as absolutely secret,

0773b928-7609-4f31-bfe7-401eaf24c017.label: text_chunk

731b099a-fc00-4a32-91a1-c99f8322d7f7.label: text_chunk
731b099a-fc00-4a32-91a1-c99f8322d7f7.text:
vi) to ascertain that each person who receives Confidential Information is made aware of and comply with this Agreement;

 and

vii) to immediately upon request deliver to the other Party all Confidential Information that belong to that Party in any form without retaining any copies thereof,

 or, at the other Party’s option, certify in writing that all copies of such information have been destroyed.

4.

4714ae8a-c0d2-4d09-8763-e3e43b95fe51.label: text_chunk
4714ae8a-c0d2-4d09-8763-e3e43b95fe51.text:
Disclosure under mandatory law

If either Party due to mandatory law is forced to disclose information which would otherwise be considered as Confidential Information, the Party shall prior to the disclosure inform the other Party hereof and the Parties shall mutually decide how to minimize the negative consequences thereof.

5. Indemnification

The Parties undertake to reimburse, indemnify and hold the other Party harmless from any damages, loss or expense incurred by it as a result of either Party violating the terms of this Agreement.

56020c06-7c57-45a4-8c2c-c6bbe2ef1f31.label: text_chunk
56020c06-7c57-45a4-8c2c-c6bbe2ef1f31.text:
6. No license

Nothing in this Agreement shall be deemed to constitute or to imply the granting of any license, immunity or other right under any intellectual property right of either Party, or to
DOCUMENT NO. HDX4-51-130 Replaces SCM-0021
LEGAL#1597040V1
provide a commitment of any kind by either Party to enter into further agreements with the other Party.

7.

8637ebce-1df6-48d8-848d-c008b6235820.label: text_chunk
8637ebce-1df6-48d8-848d-c008b6235820.text:
Disputes and Governing Law

7.1 Any and all disputes,

 controversies and claims arising out of or in connection with this Agreement, or the breach, termination or invalidity hereof, shall be settled by arbitration in accordance with the Rules of the Arbitration Institute of the Stockholm Chamber of Commerce. The arbitral tribunal shall be composed of three arbitrators. The place of arbitration including the making of the award shall be Stockholm, Sweden.

c7974ef3-0ea9-4817-9e20-dd04e108c42f.label: text_chunk
c7974ef3-0ea9-4817-9e20-dd04e108c42f.text:
The language to be used in the arbitral proceedings shall be English.

7.2 This Agreement shall be governed by the substantive laws of Sweden.

8. Term and termination

8.1 This Agreement enters into force when signed by both Parties.

 The initial term of the Agreement is three (3) years.

32bfe5a8-76ce-4859-98ae-f996731c62ce.label: text_chunk
32bfe5a8-76ce-4859-98ae-f996731c62ce.text:
If the Agreement is not terminated by notice six (6) months prior to the end of each term, it shall be extended with twelve (12) months with the same notice period until terminated as aforesaid by any Party. However, all obligations of confidentiality and non-use will survive the termination of this Agreement.

8.

2 The obligations under this Agreement shall apply retroactively to any information exchanged prior to the effectiveness of this Agreement.

8.

8c2ce0d6-9835-4e4e-80b6-f620499ed78a.label: text_chunk
8c2ce0d6-9835-4e4e-80b6-f620499ed78a.text:
3 Should the Parties enter into an agreement of the type referred in Section 1 the confidentiality provisions in such agreement will prevail over this Agreement.______________
DOCUMENT NO. HDX4-51-130 Replaces SCM-0021
LEGAL#1597040V1
This Agreement has been executed in two (2) identical copies of which the Parties have taken one (1) each.

community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Haldex and Supplier**

1. **Non-disclosure Agreement**: Haldex is involved in the creation or signing of a Non-disclosure Agreement (NDA) to safeguard its proprietary information. This indicates a proactive approach to protecting sensitive data.

2. **Contractual Relationship**: Both Haldex and the Supplier are parties to the NDA, establishing a formal contractual relationship that outlines their obligations and protections regarding confidential information.

3. **Collaborative Efforts**: Haldex and the Supplier are actively collaborating to assess the potential for entering into a broader agreement, highlighting their willingness to work together and explore mutual interests.

Overall, these relationships illustrate Haldex's commitment to protecting its proprietary information while fostering collaboration with the Supplier through formal agreements.
community_summary.1:
The relationships between the entities involved, specifically Haldex and the Supplier, revolve around the management and exchange of Confidential Information and the establishment of a formal Agreement. 

1. **Confidential Information Exchange**: Haldex and the Supplier are required to share Confidential Information as part of their evaluation process, which fosters a collaborative relationship focused on information sharing.

2. **Management of Confidential Information**: Both parties are tasked with the responsibility of treating and managing the Confidential Information according to the guidelines specified in their agreement, highlighting a direct and accountable relationship.

3. **Mutual Agreement**: The Parties are entering into a formal Agreement, indicating their mutual consent to adhere to the terms outlined in the document, which solidifies their commitment to the established relationship.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the importance of confidentiality, responsibility, and mutual consent in the interactions between Haldex and the Supplier.

The relationships surrounding "Confidential Information" highlight its critical role in agreements between Parties. 

1. **Confidential Information and Parties**: Confidential Information is shared between Parties under specific confidentiality terms, emphasizing the importance of trust and protection in these exchanges. Each Party has a responsibility to safeguard the information disclosed to them.

2. **Ownership**: Confidential Information is explicitly stated to belong to a Party, which underscores the legal obligation of that Party to protect the sensitive information as outlined in the agreement.

3. **Purpose**: The use of Confidential Information is restricted to the purposes defined in Section 1 of the agreement, establishing a clear legal framework that governs how the information can be utilized.

In summary, the relationships illustrate that Confidential Information is a shared asset between Parties, with defined ownership and specific purposes for its use, all aimed at ensuring confidentiality and protection of sensitive data.

community_summary.21:
The relationships summarized involve key legal frameworks that govern employee rights and protections for whistleblowers.

1. **Executive Order No. 12958** and **Section 7211 of Title 5**: Both entities are concerned with employee rights and obligations. The Executive Order establishes general rules that complement the specific provisions of Section 7211, ensuring that they do not conflict with one another.

2. **Section 1034 of Title 10** and the **Military Whistleblower Protection Act**: These entities are focused on safeguarding individuals who report misconduct. Section 1034 specifically protects military personnel, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act offers broader protections applicable to various disclosures.

Overall, these relationships highlight the legal frameworks designed to protect employee rights and ensure the safety of whistleblowers, particularly in military contexts.
community_summary.22: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant legislative measure that amends Title 5 of the United States Code, specifically enhancing protections for whistleblowers through Section 2302(b)(8). This amendment underscores the commitment to safeguarding individuals who report misconduct, thereby promoting transparency and accountability within government and organizations. The relationship between the Act and the amendment highlights the importance of legal frameworks in supporting whistleblower rights.
community_summary.23: The Intelligence Identities Protection Act of 1982 is a significant piece of legislation that falls under the broader legal framework established in Title 5. This framework encompasses various laws that provide protections for federal employees. The relationship highlights the Act's role within a larger context of federal employee rights and protections, emphasizing its importance in safeguarding intelligence identities.

community_summary.30:
The relationships outlined highlight the significant impact of the Woolsey Fire on various infrastructure projects in the area. 

1. **Guardrail Replacement Citywide**: This project was initiated due to damage caused by the Woolsey Fire, which affected guardrails throughout the city.

2. **Latigo Canyon Road Culvert Repairs**: The storm drain on Latigo Canyon Road suffered damage from the Woolsey Fire, prompting the need for repairs.

3. **Encinal Canyon Road Drainage Improvements**: Similar to the previous projects, this initiative is a direct response to the damage inflicted by the Woolsey Fire on drainage systems.

Overall, the Woolsey Fire has been a catalyst for multiple infrastructure repair and improvement projects, specifically targeting damaged guardrails and drainage systems in the affected areas.
community_summary.31: The relationships highlight two interconnected infrastructure repair projects in the Corral Canyon area: the Corral Canyon Road Bridge Repairs and the Corral Canyon Culvert Repairs. Both projects are part of initiatives led by FEMA and CalOES, focusing on addressing various types of damage to the infrastructure. The emphasis is on the collaborative effort to restore and enhance the safety and functionality of the road and bridge systems in this region.
community_summary.32:
**Summary of Relationships:**

Clover Heights is associated with a Storm Drain project that has been specifically designed to address flooding issues in the area. This relationship highlights the significance of the storm drain as a crucial infrastructure initiative aimed at mitigating flooding concerns in Clover Heights.
community_summary.33: The Woolsey Fire has a significant impact on infrastructure planning, specifically triggering the need for the Storm Drain Master Plan. This catastrophic event resulted in federal assistance and funding aimed at improving the storm drainage systems in the affected areas. The relationship underscores the connection between natural disasters and subsequent governmental responses to enhance community resilience through infrastructure development.
community_summary.34: The relationship between "Completion Date" and "Spring 2022" indicates that the project is expected to be completed during this specific time frame. community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
community_summary.36:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure** and **Los Angeles County Flood Control**: The Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure project is dependent on obtaining a maintenance agreement from the Los Angeles County Flood Control organization, which is essential for the project's construction to move forward.
